title: spiesia lagopus
intro: Spiesia lagopus, also known as the Arctic poppy or Spiesia, is a flowering plant native to the Arctic tundra regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it effective in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions. The health benefits of Spiesia lagopus include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and providing relief from pain and itching. The plant can be used in herbal preparations such as infusions, tinctures, and salves, which are often used topically to benefit from its medicinal properties.
